testCases.featureName: FUNCTION 39: MANAGE FAVOURITE LIST - DETAIL GROUP LIST
testCases.requirement: 1 | Favourites Listing: 1. Display beneficiaries in Favouritess, sorted in ascending order (A-Z, 0-9) in the below order: - Beneficiary Name - Beneficiary Bank Name - Account Number 2. If the recipient list is not empty, [Edit] option will be displayed. Otherwise hide. 3. Lazy load is available | ECLIPSE: 1. Retrieve Fav beneficiary list with sorting order specified, & pagination.
